sidebar.cta: Have a product or system you want to build?

hero.title: I build reliable web products with clean interfaces and solid systems.
hero.lead: I turn business requirements into full-stack applications that are easy to use, stable at the system level, and ready to evolve with the team.
hero.subtitle: From user experience to backend architecture and deployment, I build systems as one coherent product—not a loose collection of features.
hero.footerLine: Experience across B2B platforms, internal systems, CMS, e-commerce, and data-driven applications.
hero.dashboardSubtitle: Digital products shaped by business context and backed by solid engineering.
hero.summerTitle: Digital products that work as well as they look.
hero.summerLead: I design and build full-stack interfaces that feel clear, structured, and ready to ship.

about.title: Building with product context and clear engineering foundations.
about.p1: I look at each feature through user workflows, business needs, and system impact. The goal is not just to ship, but to make the product easier to operate and improve.
about.p2: My work spans frontend, backend, databases, integrations, and deployment with a practical approach to maintainability and long-term clarity.

highlights.h1d: Every technical decision should support the user experience and business outcome.
highlights.h2d: Prioritizing performance, reliability, and release workflows teams can trust.
highlights.h3d: Modular architecture that remains readable, testable, maintainable, and adaptable.
highlights.h4d: Turning cross-functional needs into concrete decisions and focused execution.

projects.title: Selected projects focused on workflows and real outcomes.
projects.subtitle: A focused selection of platforms, internal tools, and websites built to simplify processes, speed up work, and support operations.

saku.title: SAKU Finance
saku.description: An AI-powered personal finance SaaS for natural-language transaction logging, receipt OCR, multi-wallet management, budgets, goals, billing reminders, and actionable financial insights.

mekarjaya.title: Mekarjaya Village Profile Website
mekarjaya.description: An official village website for public information transparency, village profiles, news, announcements, galleries, public services, authentication, and a CMS dashboard for independent content management.

hrmis.title: BPD Abujapi HRMIS
hrmis.description: An HR management system for employee data, attendance, payroll, and performance evaluation with real-time processing.

drizy.title: DrizyCraft
drizy.description: A digital design e-commerce platform with microservices, Stripe payments, Redis caching, and gRPC communication.

cms.title: Abujapi Admin CMS
cms.description: A CMS for the BPD Abujapi profile site with media management and role-based access.

profile.title: BPD Abujapi Profile Website
profile.description: A responsive organization profile website for services, company information, and CMS-managed content.

batik.title: Batik Merawit
batik.description: A batik product management system with CRUD operations, data export, QR codes, and a product showcase.

experience.title: Professional experience building products for real teams.
experience.subtitle: Roles across interface development, backend systems, integrations, optimization, and deployment workflows.

lead.summary: Working on internal product systems used by operational teams, with responsibility across frontend implementation, backend integration, deployment flow, and maintainability.
lead.b1: Maintain and improve the Electronic Official Memo system, including UI workflows, document handling, approval flow, and reliability fixes for internal communication.
lead.b2: Develop an eContract B2B platform from scratch for contract lifecycle management, digital signing preparation, user roles, and business process automation.
lead.b3: Implement CI/CD pipelines with Docker and Jenkins across development, staging, and production so releases are repeatable and easier to monitor.

senior.summary: Built and supported commerce-oriented platforms where product experience, API design, payment flow, and operational stability had to move together.
senior.b1: Developed and maintained Drizy and DrizyCraft features with Next.js and NestJS, covering storefront pages, dashboard flows, and API-backed product operations.
senior.b2: Optimized PostgreSQL queries, Redis caching strategy, and application flows to reduce avoidable latency and improve day-to-day performance.
senior.b3: Set up Docker-based deployment, reverse proxy configuration, environment management, and production support for smoother delivery.

mid.summary: Focused on frontend systems for transactional workflows, translating product requirements into clear interfaces connected to production APIs.
mid.b1: Built an internet service installation transaction interface for a major Indonesian provider, including forms, validation states, and order flow screens.
mid.b2: Created responsive components with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS while keeping patterns reusable across related screens.
mid.b3: Integrated REST APIs and improved search, filtering, ordering, and error states to make operator workflows easier to complete.

junior.b1: Developed a company profile website using Laravel, Inertia.js, React, and MySQL.
junior.b2: Built an internal financial reporting system to improve access to company information.
junior.b3: Implemented structured data management and reporting features for internal operations.

freelance.summary: Delivered end-to-end web products and operational systems across finance, HR, CMS, company profiles, and community management workflows.
freelance.b1: Built SAKU, an AI personal finance app for automatic transaction recording through AI chat and receipt or transaction scanning.
freelance.b2: Integrated Google OAuth, Turnstile, Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, Sentry, and production observability workflows.
freelance.b3: Built backend and infrastructure flows with Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker, Kubernetes, Grafana, Loki, and Promtail.
freelance.b4: Built an HRIS management system for BPD Abujapi Jabar covering employee data and HR operations.
freelance.b5: Built Batik Merawit management features for product data, catalog workflows, and admin operations.
freelance.b6: Built village websites, company profile sites, and admin CMS systems for publishing and managing organizational information.

chatbot.title: Portfolio assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask about projects, experience, stack, or collaboration fit.
chatbot.intro: Hi, I’m here to help you quickly understand Gani’s work and technical focus.
chatbot.prompt: Try asking about selected projects or full-stack experience.
chatbot.helper: Ask about fit, projects, stack, experience, or how to collaborate.
chatbot.error: Sorry, I could not reach the assistant right now. Please try again in a moment.

contact.title: Have a product, system, or workflow that needs better software?
contact.subtitle: Share the context, goals, and constraints. I am open to full-time roles, selected projects, and focused product collaborations.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.sent: WhatsApp has opened. Please review and send the message.
form.whatsappIntro: Hi Gani, I am contacting you from your portfolio.

footer.tagline: Full-stack web development with clean interfaces, reliable systems, and practical delivery.

home.description: Portfolio of Gani Ramadhan, a Bandung-based full-stack engineer building reliable web products with React, Next.js, Go, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes.

about.description: Learn how Gani Ramadhan approaches product engineering, clean interfaces, backend systems, data stores, deployment workflows, and maintainable architecture.

projects.title: Projects — Gani Ramadhan
projects.description: Selected projects by Gani Ramadhan, including HRIS, CMS, e-commerce, AI finance, company profile, and operational web systems built for real workflows.

experience.title: Experience — Gani Ramadhan
